# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Build artifacts
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run build

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-package
          path: ./dist

  deploy-to-stage:
    needs: [build-and-deploy]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-package
          path: ./deployment-package

      - name: Deploy to stage
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run deploy-stage
          ls -l ./deployment-package

  deploy-to-production:
    needs: [deploy-to-stage]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment-package
          path: ./deployment-package

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run deploy-production
          ls -l ./deployment-package
